LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES GIBBONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND ON THE FRAUD, NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD SPECIFIC ALLEGATIONS AS TO GIBBONS, SUCH AS THOSE COMMUNICATIONS CITED IN OPPOSITION BRIEF. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT, AND DEFENDANT, 30 DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. COUNSEL WAIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER FOR PURPOSES OF FILING THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JAMES GIBBONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend on the fraud, negligent misrepresentation causes of action to plead specific allegations as to Gibbons, such as those communications cited in opposition brief. Plaintiff is granted 30 days leave to amend the complaint, and defendant, 30 days to respond to the amended complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Counsel waived notice of entry of the order for purposes of filing the amended complaint. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR #7489
